title: Cryptool named top-10 finalist at Next Block Expo pitch contest
content_html:
Cryptool has been selected as one of the ten finalists for the Next Block Expo Pitch Contest.

The contest takes place in Warsaw on 19 to 20 March 2025, with prizes of up to 225,000 EUR for the top three. The Cryptool team will be on the ground in Warsaw to pitch and to meet investors, partners and operators in the wider Web3 space.

If you are attending NBX and would like to meet, please reach out directly to CEO Ron.
author: Cryptool
